displayNameZh: 有了工具和 Skill，开发流程长这样
summary: Yt Dev Flow Intro component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「有了工具和 Skill，开发流程长这样」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-dev-flow-intro/src/YtDevFlowIntro.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtDevFlowIntro` and `ytDevFlowIntroDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Dev Flow Intro Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-dev-flow-intro to my project. Preserve the exported YtDevFlowIntroProps API and register the YtDevFlowIntro composition with the default props.
